title: secale vavilovii subsp. segetale
intro: Secale vavilovii subsp. segetale, also known as Vavilov's wheatgrass or segetal rye grass, is a type of flowering plant in the family Poaceae and is closely related to wheat. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Secale vavilovii subsp. segetale include its ability to reduce stress, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Secale vavilovii subsp. segetale is typically prepared as a juice or tea for herbal use.
